query:
SELECT tipoRemuneracao, indexador, COUNT(*) as total,
  MIN(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as min_z,
  MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as max_z,
  AVG(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) as avg_z
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY tipoRemuneracao, indexador
ORDER BY total DESC;
